channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump's anti-weaponization fund stalls ICE funding deal
item.description: A $72 billion funding package for ICE and Border Patrol is stalled after GOP senators opposed President Trump's $1.776B anti-weaponization fund.

item.title: Democrats release 2024 election autopsy after criticism
item.description: The Democratic National Committee released its full, unredacted review of the 2024 presidential election on Thursday.

item.title: White House postpones AI EO signing ceremony
item.description: The White House postponed a ceremony for President Trump to sign a new executive order on AI and cybersecurity.

item.title: Trump eyes more GOP targets for revenge in 2028
item.description: After targeting GOP dissenters in recent primaries, President Trump is compiling a list of Republicans for potential 2028 challenges.
